introSection: Queen Cobra is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Đà Nẵng, Vietnam.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Queen Cobra opened on 27 January 2017 as the tallest, fastest, and steepest coaster in Vietnam. It no longer holds these records.

fullText:
Queen Cobra is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Đà Nẵng, Vietnam.

Queen Cobra opened on 27 January 2017 as the tallest, fastest, and steepest coaster in Vietnam. It no longer holds these records.
